name: Transit
description: Next departures from configured stops. Transit APIs are heterogeneous, so this screen consumes a generic JSON feed your reverse proxy / glue script produces: { stops: [{ name, departures: [{ when, line, destination, minutes? }] }] }. Wire that to Resrobot, MBTA, Rejseplanen, etc.

feed_url.description: URL returning the JSON shape described above
